SELECT  $$Hint1
TARGET_TABLE.ROW_WID, 
TARGET_TABLE.FST_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.MID_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.LAST_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.PREV_LAST_NAME,

TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_COUNTRY_REGION,

TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_ADDR_EFF_DATE, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_ST_ADDRESS, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_CITY, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTY, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_STATE_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_STATE_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_STATE_REGION, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTRY_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTRY_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTRY_REGION, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_ZIPCODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_POST_OFFICE_BOX, 
TARGET_TABLE.WORK_ADDR_EFF_DATE, 
TARGET_TABLE.ALTERNATE_EMAIL_ADDR, 
TARGET_TABLE.WEB_ADDRESS, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_FORMED_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_HIRE_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.ORIG_HIRE_DT_WID, 
TARGET_TABLE.ADJ_SERVICE_DT_WID, 
TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERMIT_ST_DT_WID, 
TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERMIT_END_DT_WID, 
TARGET_TABLE.CONTRACT_ST_DT_WID, 
TARGET_TABLE.CONTRACT_END_DT_WID, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMPLOYEE_NUM, 
TARGET_TABLE.ALT_EMP_NUM, 
TARGET_TABLE.APPLICANT_NUM,
TARGET_TABLE.CONTINGENT_WORKER_NUM,
TARGET_TABLE.DEPARTMENT_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.DEPARTMENT_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.POSITION_TYPE_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.POSITION_TYPE_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.JOB_CATEGORY_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.JOB_CATEGORY_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.MARITAL_STAT_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.MARITAL_STAT_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.PAR_HELD_POSTN, 
TARGET_TABLE.PR_POSTN, 
TARGET_TABLE.SPOUSE_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.NATNL_ID_NUM, 
TARGET_TABLE.NATNL_ID_TYPE_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.NATNL_ID_TYPE_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.CITIZENSHIP_STATUS_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.CITIZENSHIP_STATUS_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.W_ETHNIC_GRP_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.W_ETHNIC_GRP_DESC, 
TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERM_TYPE_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERM_TYPE_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.NATIVE_LANG_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.NATIVE_LANG_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.SEC_FLU_LANG_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.SEC_FLU_LANG_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.THR_FLU_LANG_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.THR_FLU_LANG_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.W_VETERAN_STATUS_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.W_VETERAN_STATUS_DESC, 
TARGET_TABLE.DISABILITY_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.DISABILITY_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.EDUCATION_BCKGND_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.EDUCATION_BCKGND_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.HIEST_EDU_DEG_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.HIEST_EDU_DEG_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.RELIGION_CODE,
TARGET_TABLE.RELIGION_NAME,
TARGET_TABLE.APPR_CURCY_CD, 
TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH_CAT_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH_CAT_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_BU_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_LOC, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.PAR_INTEGRATION_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.PAR_DEMOG_INTEGRATION_ID,
TARGET_TABLE.PAR_DEMOG_WID,
TARGET_TABLE.VIS_PR_BU_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.VIS_PR_POS_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG, 
TARGET_TABLE.W_UPDATE_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.ETL_PROC_WID, 
TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.X_CUSTOM,
TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT,
TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_TO_DT ,
TARGET_TABLE.CHANGED_ON_DT
FROM
W_EMPLOYEE_D TARGET_TABLE,
      (SELECT     
      SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, 
      SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
      FROM
      W_EMPLOYEE_D SCD_OUTER, 
            (SELECT
            DELTA_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID,
            DELTA_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            FROM
            W_EMPLOYEE_D DELTA_OUTER
            WHERE 
            DELTA_OUTER.ETL_PROC_WID = $$ETL_PROC_WID 
            ) DELTA_TABLE
      WHERE
      SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID = DELTA_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID AND
      SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DELTA_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
      GROUP BY
      SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, 
      SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
      HAVING
      COUNT(*) > 1
      ) SCD_HISTORY
WHERE
TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID = SCD_HISTORY.INTEGRATION_ID AND
TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = SCD_HISTORY.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND
TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG = (CASE WHEN '$$UDATE_ALL_HISTORY' = 'Y' THEN CURRENT_FLG ELSE 'Y' END) $$Hint2	
ORDER BY
TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT DESC

TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG = (CASE WHEN '$$UDATE_ALL_HISTORY' = 'Y' THEN CURRENT_FLG ELSE 'Y' END) $$Hint2

TARGET_TABLE.HIEST_EDU_DEG_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.RELIGION_CODE,
TARGET_TABLE.RELIGION_NAME,
TARGET_TABLE.APPR_CURCY_CD, 
TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH_CAT_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH_CAT_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_BU_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_LOC, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.PAR_INTEGRATION_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.PAR_DEMOG_INTEGRATION_ID,
TARGET_TABLE.PAR_DEMOG_WID,
TARGET_TABLE.VIS_PR_BU_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.VIS_PR_POS_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG, 
TARGET_TABLE.W_UPDATE_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.ETL_PROC_WID, 
TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.X_CUSTOM,
TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT,
TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_TO_DT,
TARGET_TABLE.CHANGED_ON_DT 
FROM
W_EMPLOYEE_D TARGET_TABLE,
      (SELECT     
      SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, 
      SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
      FROM
      W_EMPLOYEE_D SCD_OUTER, 
            (SELECT
            DELTA_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID,
            DELTA_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            FROM
            W_EMPLOYEE_D DELTA_OUTER
            WHERE 
            DELTA_OUTER.ETL_PROC_WID = $$ETL_PROC_WID AND
			DELTA_OUTER.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
            ) DELTA_TABLE
      WHERE
      SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID = DELTA_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID AND
      SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DELTA_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND
	  SCD_OUTER.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
      GROUP BY
      SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, 
      SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
      HAVING
      COUNT(*) > 1
      ) SCD_HISTORY
WHERE
TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID = SCD_HISTORY.INTEGRATION_ID AND
TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = SCD_HISTORY.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND
TARGET_TABLE.DELETE_FLG = 'N' AND
TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG = (CASE WHEN '$$UDATE_ALL_HISTORY' = 'Y' THEN CURRENT_FLG ELSE 'Y' END) $$Hint2
--AND TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID = '665406'
ORDER BY
TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT DESC

TARGET_TABLE.DISABILITY_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.DISABILITY_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.EDUCATION_BCKGND_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.EDUCATION_BCKGND_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.HIEST_EDU_DEG_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.HIEST_EDU_DEG_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.RELIGION_CODE,
TARGET_TABLE.RELIGION_NAME,
TARGET_TABLE.APPR_CURCY_CD, 
TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH_CAT_CODE, 
TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH_CAT_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_BU_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_LOC, 
TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_NAME, 
TARGET_TABLE.PAR_INTEGRATION_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.PAR_DEMOG_INTEGRATION_ID,
TARGET_TABLE.PAR_DEMOG_WID,
TARGET_TABLE.VIS_PR_BU_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.VIS_PR_POS_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG, 
TARGET_TABLE.W_UPDATE_DT, 
TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.ETL_PROC_WID, 
TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.X_CUSTOM,
TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT,
TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_TO_DT,
TARGET_TABLE.CHANGED_ON_DT 
FROM
W_EMPLOYEE_D TARGET_TABLE,
      (SELECT     
      SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, 
      SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
      FROM
      W_EMPLOYEE_D SCD_OUTER, 
            (SELECT
            DELTA_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID,
            DELTA_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            FROM
            W_EMPLOYEE_D DELTA_OUTER
            WHERE 
            DELTA_OUTER.ETL_PROC_WID = $$ETL_PROC_WID AND
			DELTA_OUTER.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
            ) DELTA_TABLE
      WHERE
      SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID = DELTA_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID AND
      SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DELTA_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND
	  SCD_OUTER.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
      GROUP BY
      SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, 
      SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
      HAVING
      COUNT(*) > 1
      ) SCD_HISTORY
WHERE
TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID = SCD_HISTORY.INTEGRATION_ID AND
TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = SCD_HISTORY.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND
TARGET_TABLE.DELETE_FLG = 'N' AND
TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG = (CASE WHEN '$$UDATE_ALL_HISTORY' = 'Y' THEN CURRENT_FLG ELSE 'Y' END) $$Hint2
--AND TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID = '665406'
ORDER BY
TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, 
TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT DESC
